name: snipalot
description: Portable Windows screen-feedback tool: record, annotate live, transcribe, and hand an LLM-ready prompt to your clipboard.
author: Jason Koprowski

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs && node scripts/make-icon.mjs
scripts.package: npm run kill:stale && npm run build && electron-builder
scripts.package:nopublish: npm run kill:stale && npm run build && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.package:portable: npm run kill:stale && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.package:full: npm run kill:stale && npm run fetch-resources && npm run build && npm run assert-resources && electron-builder --config electron-builder.full.yml
scripts.package:full:nopublish: npm run kill:stale && npm run fetch-resources && npm run build && npm run assert-resources && electron-builder --config electron-builder.full.yml --publish never
